rationale: Bound D = pearson(T1, T3) = absolute upper bound for ANY model that perfectly predicts T1 alone. Bound A = oracle T1 (perfect prediction) + mean R = upper bound subject to using only T1. Bound B = current T1 prediction quality + mean R. Bound C = current T1 prediction + simple linear residual model. Bound E = inductive shrinkage map T1_pred → T3 (fold-local). Realistic max for our pipeline = bound E (this is what iter 2.2 will optimize).
